strings.panel.p1.narration.1.html: And so, having lost another game, the player quits and shuts off his game system.
strings.panel.p2.bubble.center.html: Everytime the system's off, I find myself in this strange empty place.
strings.panel.p3.bubble.center.html: What is this endless void? Is it the great beyond? Is it where deleted data goes?
strings.panel.p4.bubble.center.html: Is time passing while I'm here? Am I still technically alive, or even conscious right now? If not, then why do I sense this place at all?
strings.panel.p5.narration.1.html: Careful Radd, you're starting to sound deep.
strings.panel.p5.bubble.center.html: I mean... This is bogus! Uncool! Non-gnarly! Or something...
